official_functions.role: Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Construct, write, and decode the block_changed_ack packet body
Define the sequence field body shape
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound block_changed_ack frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns block_changed_ack immediately after award_stats.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the block_changed_ack id to ClientboundBlockChangedAckPacket.
The official block_changed_ack body is a single sequence field encoded with FriendlyByteBuf VarInt.
The fixture uses the public ClientboundBlockChangedAckPacket(int) constructor, so it does not require initialized Minecraft/game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded sequence, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove block prediction semantics, client world correction behavior, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer block prediction semantics, client world correction behavior, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
